name: The Whispering Woods
description: An ancient primeval forest where the trees themselves are said to be sentient and the boundaries between the Material Plane and the Feywild blur into nothing. Travelers who stray from the marked paths often vanish for years, returning aged not a single day — or never returning at all.

properties.population: 15,000 — scattered across hidden groves and treeholmes
properties.terrain: Dense primeval forest with fey crossings and shifting paths
properties.knownThreats: Fey tricksters, awakened predators, and the Thornblight corruption
